parameters.text:
📋 *Template Layer Info*

What would you like to see?

🔹 Type `ALL` → Layer info for *all* posts
🔹 Type `TemplateInfo <PostID>` → Layer info for a specific post

_Example: `TemplateInfo SI-001`_

additionalFields.caption:
📋 Template Layer Info — use this to plan your edits!

💡 Tip: Use the exact layer names when editing.
